titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Diploma and Certificates Collection
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 12, 2019 at 07:29
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.abstract: The material consists of blank samples of diplomas and certificates, press releases, and news clippings documenting degrees, certificates, and honors conferred by Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 47 (YRG 47), Collections documenting teaching and learning in Yale academic programs.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Requires written permission of the author or copyright holder to copy.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Diploma and Certificates Collection (RU 366). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The material consists of blank samples of diplomas and certificates, press releases, and news clippings documenting degrees, certificates, and honors conferred by Yale.

did.unittitle: Blank diplomas and certificates, degree lists, and press releases

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Requires written permission of the author or copyright holder to copy.

did.unittitle: Diploma collection as maintained by the Secretary's Office

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Requires written permission of the author or copyright holder to copy.

did.unittitle: Conversion of the Bachelor to Master
Master of Divinity..Conv. from Bachelor (Latin and English)
Bachelor of Arts Honor is Causa
Undergraduate and graduate diplomas and certificates of honor

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Requires written permission of the author or copyright holder to copy.
